page_content:
DANC308 Choreography II (3 Credits)

Exploration of the formal elements of choreography; theme, development, repetition, contrast, transition, continuity and structure.

Prerequisite: DANC208.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

DANC309 Choreography III: Dance Composition (3 Credits) Exploration of the structural elements of dance composition. Prerequisite: DANC207.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-Dance department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. DANC209 or DANC309.
